title: Supergoal Board heartbeat
description: One file per agent at $SUPERGOAL_RUN_DIR/agents/<agent_id>.json, replaced atomically by sg-emit. A point-in-time snapshot; tasks[] is a full board snapshot, never a delta.

agent_id.description: stable per agent for the run: slug(repo-branch-worktreehash[-slot])

branch.description: advisory only; multiple agents may share it; never a mutex

worktree.description: worktree root (== repo_path unless a linked worktree)

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC Z; agent registration time, immutable

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC Z; bumped on every emit; the PRIMARY liveness clock

pid.description: advisory only; readers use updated_at age as the primary liveness signal (Claude Code tool calls have no stable per-agent pid)

tasks.description: full board snapshot each emit; small list, re-serialized so the reader stays stateless
